rulings.Case Title: EMILY LIOU et al VS. CALIFORNIA PUBLIC EMPLOYEES' RETIREMENT SYSTEM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of Pltf And For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, June 27, 2011, line 3. DEFENDANT ANTHEM BLUE CROSS LIFE & HEALTH INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff And For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff. Defendant's motion to compel is granted in part. The court requires that defendant do one of the following: either depose plaintiffs at a time when they are in the country. The location of the deposition may be chosen by defendant within the legal parameters. If defendant wishes to pick a time when plaintiffs are not in the country for deposition, then defendant must pay for plaintiffs to travel here or travel to China to take the plaintiff's deposition. Requests for sanctions by both parties are denied. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: MARY ALLEN VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice 9of M9otion And Motion To Compel Further Respons4s To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Request For Production, And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, June 27, 2011, line 5. PLAINTIFF MARY ALLEN'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Request For Production, And Request For Sanctions. Plaintiff's motion to compel is granted in part and denied in part. Hearing is required in part. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories 12.2 and 12.3 is denied. As to interrogatores 12.6, 15.1 and 16.1-16.7, is granted. Plaintiff's motion fo compel responses to request for document numbers 3, 4 and 8 is granted. Hearing required on request for documents 5-7 and request for sanctions. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: CROWN BUILDING MAINTENANCE, INC., A BUILDING VS. SBM SITE SERVICES, LLC, AN OREGON LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Moton For Protective Order And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, June 27, 2011, line 8. CROSS DEFENDANTS MARK KELLY, RICHARD MULKERRINS, MICHAEL MCGEE'S Moton For Protective Order And For Sanctions. Defendants' motion for protective order is granted. John Garrent, a non-resident of California cannot be compelled to appear in California for deposition. Moreover, this court will not make any orders adverse or contradictory to orders of the Federal Court in Colorado. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID BRYAN VS. U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR J.P. et al

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, June 27, 2011, line 9. DEFENDANT U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's demurrer is overruled. Plaintiff has standing to bring the U.C.L. action because he is only seeking injunctive relief and he has properly pled fact that support his claim. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE ACQUISITION, LLC, A VS. DAN LU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, June 27, 2011, line 14. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE ACQUISITION, LLC'S Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint. Plaintiff's motion for leave to file a second amended complaint is granted in part and denied in part. Plaintiff may amend to add a further basis regarding the alleged illegal assignment. Plaintiff cannot amend to add the additional 3rd cause of action for a breach of the use clause and the claim for damages on that claim per C.C.P. 1161 (4). =(302/LMG)
